scripts.cf:dev: bun run cf:migrate && concurrently "bun run dev:client" "wrangler dev --local" "bun run mock-oidc"
scripts.cf:migrate: bun run cf:schema:gen && wrangler d1 migrations apply lang-mirror-db --local && wrangler d1 execute lang-mirror-db --local --file=scripts/seed-mock-oidc.sql
scripts.cf:migrate:remote: bun run cf:schema:gen && wrangler d1 migrations apply lang-mirror-db --remote
scripts.clean:cf: lsof -ti :7842 2>/dev/null | xargs kill -9 2>/dev/null; lsof -ti :7843 2>/dev/null | xargs kill -9 2>/dev/null; rm -rf .wrangler/state && echo '✓ CF local state cleared (D1 + R2 + KV + ports)'
